commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=bad8aa5012c8c09e263bfc4e2ccca454a7e8fbd7)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes memory-core supplement search to use settled-result aggregation, warn with the rejecting plugin id, adds memory-core regression coverage, and adds a changelog fix entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: register one resolving and one rejecting memory corpus supplement, then call memory_search with corpus=all; current main awaits Promise.all in searchMemoryCorpusSupplements, so the rejection aborts sibling results. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Contributor/human follow-up is needed for real behavior proof and the bounded-wait review finding; ClawSweeper should not create repair markers while proof from the contributor setup is still missing.
commands.reason: author association CONTRIBUTOR and repository permission read are not allowed
